prompt_en: Say: It would be an act of serious negligence not to perform proper due diligence in this acquisition.
expected_es: Sería un acto de negligencia grave no realizar la diligencia debida en esta adquisición.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'sería' for a hypothetical evaluation or what something would be under certain conditions.

prompt_en: Say: The launch of the new product will be a significant repercussion for our competitors.
expected_es: El lanzamiento del nuevo producto será una repercusión significativa para nuestros competidores.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'será' to state what something will be in the future, often as a prediction or consequence.

prompt_en: Say: It would be advisable to ensure the accommodation has good coverage, as connectivity is crucial for remote work.
expected_es: Sería aconsejable asegurar que el alojamiento sea de buena cobertura, ya que la conectividad es crucial para el trabajo remoto.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'sería' for polite recommendations or evaluations of what would be suitable/advisable.

prompt_en: Say: The primary challenge for the student body in the coming years will be adapting to artificial intelligence.
expected_es: El principal reto para el alumnado en los próximos años será la adaptación a la inteligencia artificial.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'será' to define a future role, identity, or purpose of something.

prompt_en: Say: It would be much easier to repair that leak if we had a proper caulking gun.
expected_es: Sería mucho más fácil reparar esa gotera si tuviéramos una pistola de silicona adecuada.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'sería' to express what something would be under a hypothetical or conditional circumstance.

prompt_en: Say: Our main commitment will be to foster shared parental responsibility in all family policies.
expected_es: Nuestro principal compromiso será fomentar la corresponsabilidad parental en todas las políticas familiares.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'será' to define a future objective, commitment, or what something will consist of.

prompt_en: Say: It would be an effective preventive measure to impose stricter penalties for environmental crimes.
expected_es: Sería una medida preventiva eficaz imponer penas más estrictas para los delitos ecológicos.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'sería' to express what something would be (e.g., effective, beneficial) as a hypothetical evaluation or suggestion.

prompt_en: Say: The next workshop on energy transition will be organized by the non-profit organization.
expected_es: El próximo taller sobre la transición energética será organizado por la entidad sin ánimo de lucro.
target_vocabulary: la entidad sin ánimo de lucro
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'será' to form the future passive voice, indicating who or what will perform an action on the subject.

prompt_en: Say: Developing greater resilience would be essential to face future catastrophes.
expected_es: Sería esencial desarrollar mayor resiliencia para afrontar futuras catástrofes.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'sería' to express what would be necessary or essential in a given context.

prompt_en: Say: The new remuneration policy will be crucial for employees returning from sick leave.
expected_es: La nueva política de remuneración será crucial para los empleados que regresan de la baja laboral.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'será' to state what something will be in terms of importance or its role in the future.
